decisions.rationale: Observation's base_record_id (project_34th-street-transitway-concept) is an existing registry record that already references this source (20100921_34th_cac_minutes) in its source_ids. The observation's raw text ('34th Street Transitway. Community Advisory Committee Meeting #2 Summary.') and payload (transitway concept with three design options for non-bus traffic flow) match that record's description ('Long-term concept for a river-to-river fully separated two-way transitway on one side of 34th Street with options for one-way traffic'). The closest match is the observation's own base_record_id, so decision is new — no link to a different record needed.
